query: SELECT aeId, COUNT(*) as demoCount, MIN(doneDate) as firstDemo, MAX(doneDate) as lastDemo FROM pipedrive_demo_activities WHERE aeId = 60001 AND YEAR(doneDate) = 2026 AND MONTH(doneDate) = 3 GROUP BY aeId
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT aeId, COUNT(*) as demoCount, MIN(doneDate) as firstDemo, MAX(doneDate) as lastDemo FROM pipedrive_demo_activities WHERE aeId = 60001 AND YEAR(doneDate) = 2026 AND MONTH(doneDate) = 3 GROUP BY aeId
